title: Hive
description: Adds a hive mind of smarter, hostile entities
body:
### **About**

Hive is a mod that adds a hive mind of smart entities.

### **Features**

Droids are a new hostile entity that spawn naturally with smarter movement and pathfinding. 

![Droid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ypXGbbhR/images/6e1b950956523e3178a28abadd47c34d4770188e_350.webp)

#### **WIP**

Still adding more features. The intention is to make a group of entities that can communicate and strategize to kill the player with numbers. 

Intended future features (in no particular order):
- Positioning more accurately before jumps
- Collective droid strategies
- Droid flying
- Droid placing/breaking blocks
- Boss or dungeon
